title: Preserve I/O source errors
scenario: When file reading fails, the high-level config error should keep the original std::io::Error as its source.
instructions: Change FileRead to store std::io::Error and implement std::error::Error::source for that variant.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps config-err-io-wrap explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
